nasb.text: But Absalom did not speak to Amnon either good or bad; for Absalom hated Amnon because he had violated his sister Tamar.

esv.text: But Absalom spoke to Amnon neither good nor bad, for Absalom hated Amnon, because he had violated his sister Tamar.

cnv.text: 押沙龍甚麼話都沒有對暗嫩說。押沙龍恨暗嫩，因為暗嫩污辱了他的妹妹他瑪。

ccb.text: 押沙龙没有对暗嫩说一句话，只是心里暗暗地恨他，因为他玷污了妹妹她玛。
